movie.title: Avihitham (2025) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Malayalam] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Avihitham is a 2025 Malayalam-language black comedy-drama film directed by Senna Hegde, who co-wrote the screenplay with Ambareesh Kalathera. The film has an ensemble cast including Unni Raj, Renji Kankol, Vineeth Chakyar, Dhanesh Koliyat, Rakesh Ushar and Vrinda Menon.
